jin_color.description: Allows the model to update the JIN runtime avatar center point color and its subtle glow for the current live session.
rules: Use JIN_COLOR to set single color for the live JIN avatar center point color and chat interface background tint.
Emit marker using exactly this schema <JIN_COLOR: #00f2ff > after the normal user-facing response.
Emit two or more JIN_COLOR markers in one message for consecutive color change, last color in sequence will be used as current.
If user asks you to blink or you want blinking animation - you must emit several markers with different colors in single response.
The payload must be a hex color with optional leading # and exactly 3 or 6 hex characters.
